prestazioni: Full bolt-on S63B44T0 (4.4L V8 twin-turbo) Stage 2+ tune by PTG (Performance Tuning Group) with custom ECU flash targeting 720 HP and 680 lb-ft on 93 octane, utilizing a CSF Racing high-flow aluminum radiator (P/N 3276) and upgraded oil cooler (P/N 3277) to maintain thermal stability under sustained boost

Turbocharger upgrade to Pure Stage 2+ turbo kit (P/N PS2S63) featuring Garrett GTX4274R turbos with billet compressor wheels, 0.82 A/R turbine housings, and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates, paired with custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipes (P/N PS2S63-DP) and Vibrant 1799 resonated race delete mufflers

Drivetrain reinforcement with MFactory 3.91:1 ratio helical-cut LSD (P/N MF-TC-001) in the M6-specific ZF 8HP70X 8-speed transmission, upgraded with a PTP carbon fiber driveshaft (P/N PTP-CFDS-BMW-001) and South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily dual-disc clutch (P/N SDD3-BMW-S63) with cerametallic friction material for 800+ lb-ft torque capacity
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody conversion kit (P/N RB-BMW-M6F13) with carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser, featuring extended wheel arches (+50mm front, +70mm rear) and integrated canards, paired with a custom Vorsteiner GTS5 carbon fiber rear wing (P/N V-50600001-01) with adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees)

OEM+ aggressive stance via KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers (P/N 3W931100) with 8-position rebound damping and 12-click compression adjustment, paired with H&R 20mm front and 25mm rear forged aluminum spacers (P/N 546 60001) to achieve a 255/35/20 (front) and 295/30/20 (rear) fitment on Forgeline GA3R 20x10.5" (front) and 20x12" (rear) wheels with titanium hardware

Full carbon fiber interior overhaul with Status Gruppe carbon fiber M6-specific door cards (P/N SG-CF-DC-M6F13), Alcantara-wrapped M Performance steering wheel (P/N 32002462916) with red stitching, and custom Recaro CS Sportster GT seats (P/N 24-400-715) upholstered in Nappa leather with M6 embroidery, paired with a titanium roll cage by Status Gruppe (P/N SG-RC-M6F13) for chassis rigidity
